hero_subline: A NEW FESTIVAL EXPERIENCE — NEAR LÜBECK
login_lead: Get a magic link by email — no password required.
login_sent_body: We sent you a link. Open it on this device to sign in.
login_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login_not_configured_body: The account area is being prepared. Magic-link sign-in is coming soon.
callback_body: Just a moment — we're verifying your link.
callback_error_body: Please request a new magic link.
account_login_required: You need to be signed in to view this page.
account_favorites_empty: You haven't favorited any act yet.
lineup_demo_banner_body: These are placeholders from the 2026 edition. The final 2027 acts will be announced in autumn 2026.
lineup_no_timetable_p1: As in previous years: we are NOT a headliner show, and not a concert for one big artist.
lineup_no_timetable_p2: What counts at ENERGIZE is the whole experience — the community and the shared passion for the music.
lineup_no_timetable_p3: Every set on our line-up and all of you — the entire crowd — are part of the bigger picture. ⚡
lineup_no_timetable_app_body: With a Community account and the Energize app, you'll get a notification 15 minutes before every set of your favorite acts — even without knowing the timetable.
feedback_lead: Help us make 2027 even better. Among all entries we're raffling off 2 × €50 in food & drinks credit for 2027.
feedback_liked_placeholder: e.g. sound, light show, awareness team, food …
feedback_disliked_placeholder: e.g. cashless top-up queues, toilets, shuttle …
feedback_thanks_body: Your feedback was saved. We read every response.
feedback_existing_note: You already gave feedback — feel free to update it anytime.
community_lead: More than a festival weekend. Your account turns passive attendance into active participation — favorites, photo wall, cashless, feedback. All in one place, all yours.
community_what_title: What you get as a member
community_what_1_body: Mark your acts in one click. We'll ping you 15 minutes before the set — no more missed drops.
community_what_2_body: Upload your best moments straight from the app. Moderated before going public — no bots, no trash.
community_what_3_body: Check your wristband balance any time from your account — and know when the next top-up is due.
community_what_4_body: Your feedback after each edition flows into the next. Goodie raffles every year for everyone who submits.
community_login_lead: No password. No reset hassle. Just a link in your inbox — and you're in.
community_login_step_1_body: On the login page, enter your email and click "Send magic link".
community_login_step_2_body: We'll send you a personal sign-in link within seconds.
community_login_step_3_body: Important: if the mail isn't there after 1–2 minutes, please check your spam or junk folder. Some providers sort new senders out first.
community_login_step_4_body: One click on the button in the email signs you in. The link is valid for 1 hour and only works once.
community_login_safety_body: We don't store passwords. If you lose your device, your account stays safe — nobody gets in without access to your inbox.
tickets_lead: Tickets are sold via our partner tickee. Limited capacity — go early.
tickets_phase_loyalty_body: Available in the shop now. Full festival access on 29.05.2027 including shuttle and cashless wristband. Discounted price as a thank-you for returning Energizers.
tickets_includes_4: Water stations everywhere — bring a bottle
tickets_cashless_body: Top-up before the festival via our cashless partner — avoid queues at the gate. Unused balance is refunded after the festival.
tickets_support_body: Order issues, refunds, name changes — please write to tickee directly.
tickets_external_note: You'll be redirected to shop.tickee.de — a separate, secure payment platform.
tickets_iframe_hint: Tickets are handled by our partner tickee. Payment & delivery are processed by tickee directly with you.
tickets_iframe_fallback: Shop can't be embedded? Go straight to shop.tickee.de →
account_display_name_hint: Shown on the photo wall. Can be changed anytime.
wall_lead: Your best festival moments. Every post is moderated before going public — no bots, no trash.
wall_empty_body: The wall opens at the 2027 edition. Until then: create an account, favorite acts — and post your best shots after the festival.
upload_lead: Share your best festival shot. Every image is moderated before publishing.
upload_pick_hint: Max 8 MB. JPEG, PNG, WebP or AVIF.
upload_success_body: Your photo is in. Our team reviews it before it appears on the wall.
upload_error_size: File is too large. Max 8 MB.
upload_rules_1: Own footage from Energize 2026/2027 — no stock photos, no third-party content.
upload_rules_2: No visible drugs, violence or hate.
upload_rules_3: People on the photo should consent.
upload_rules_4: You keep the rights — we may use it in your account and for marketing.
app_coming_body: Energize is coming as native apps — with push reminders for your favorite sets, offline map, photo wall straight from the camera and cashless balance at a glance. Your web account works instantly.
app_coming_notify: With an account we'll notify you the moment we launch.
